dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace shows a dedicated 'synthesis-rules' step with an extremely high completion token count (63,154), indicating an exhaustive processing of governing constraints and alignment with the semantic contract. All schema validations passed.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The sequential and parallel execution of narrative and context synthesis suggests a robust causal chain. The system successfully integrated context into the steering projection, as evidenced by the high-volume second context synthesis step.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The 'steering-projection-flow' specifically addresses architectural trade-offs by balancing narrative synthesis against rule-based constraints. The significant time investment (269s) in rule synthesis suggests deep resolution of architectural tensions.
